l293d.name: L293D Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver (PDIP-16)
l293d.description: High-current driver designed to control bidirectional speed and direction of up to two DC motors.
l293d.ascii_art:
[1mL293D Top View[0m
             +---\_/---+
     1,2EN  | 1    16 | VCC1 (Logic Supply, 5V)
     1A     | 2    15 | 4A
     1Y     | 3    14 | 4Y
     GND    | 4    13 | GND
     GND    | 5    12 | GND
     2Y     | 6    11 | 3Y
     2A     | 7    10 | 3A
     VCC2   | 8     9 | 3,4EN (Motor Power, 4.5V to 36V)
             +---------+

74hc595.name: 74HC595 8-Bit Shift Register (PDIP-16)
74hc595.description: Serial-In Parallel-Out shift register. Used to expand limited GPIO pins to control 8 outputs with just 3 MCU pins.
74hc595.ascii_art:
[1m74HC595 Top View[0m
         QB  | 1    16 | VCC (2V to 6V)
         QC  | 2    15 | QA (First Output Bit)
         QD  | 3    14 | SER (Serial Data Input)
         QE  | 4    13 | OE (Output Enable, Active Low)
         QF  | 5    12 | RCLK (Storage Latch/Register Clock)
         QG  | 6    11 | SRCLK (Shift Register Clock)
         QH  | 7    10 | SRCLR (Shift Register Clear, Active Low)
        GND  | 8     9 | QH' (Serial Out, Daisy Chain Link)
             +---------+

74hc00.name: 74HC00 Quad 2-Input NAND Gate (PDIP-14)
74hc00.description: Four independent NAND gates. A fundamental building block of digital logic systems.

74hc14.name: 74HC14 Hex Inverter with Schmitt Trigger (PDIP-14)
74hc14.description: Six independent NOT gates with hysteresis, perfect for debouncing switches and squaring up noisy signals.

cd4017.name: CD4017 CMOS Decade Counter (PDIP-16)
cd4017.description: 5-stage Johnson decade counter that produces sequential outputs from 0 to 9 on incoming clock pulses.
cd4017.ascii_art:
[1mCD4017 Top View[0m
             +---\_/---+
         Q5  | 1    16 | VDD (3V to 15V)
         Q1  | 2    15 | RESET (Active High)
         Q0  | 3    14 | CLOCK (Clock Input)
         Q2  | 4    13 | CLOCK INHIBIT (Active High)
         Q7  | 5    12 | CARRY OUT (Div-by-10)
         Q3  | 6    11 | Q9
         Q8  | 7    10 | Q4
         GND | 8     9 | Q6
             +---------+
